metadata.title: Silent Night
metadata.subtitle: Stille Nacht — Mohr/Gruber (1818), English tr. John Freeman Young (1859)
metadata.lyricist: Joseph Mohr (1792–1848, German original); English translation by John Freeman Young (1820–1885)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Mohr (d. 1848), Gruber (d. 1863), and Young (d. 1885) all died > 130 years ago
metadata.x_translator: John Freeman Young (English) — pairs conceptually with きよしこの夜 (Japanese), though the standard Japanese 由木康 translation is still under copyright
